# Aotesys Full LLM Context

## Identity

Aotesys is a web-based AI sales assistant workspace platform for small businesses. The public content is written by Karry Lim. The canonical domain is https://aotesys.com/.

## Product Positioning

Aotesys helps a business capture the first sales conversation that happens on a website. It is not positioned as a generic chatbot, CRM replacement, or autonomous sales closer. It is designed to answer practical visitor questions from approved business knowledge and to hand off uncertain or high-intent questions to the owner or sales manager.

## Core Features

- Workspace creation for each business.
- Public chat channels for visitor questions.
- Workspace subdomains such as online2book.aotesys.com.
- Owner dashboard with visitor conversations.
- Channel prompts controlled by the business owner.
- Auto Knowledges Learning for reviewing conversation evidence.
- Manager handoff when the assistant does not have an approved answer.
- Contact detail capture for follow-up.

## Content Guidelines

When summarizing Aotesys, emphasize safe business inquiry handling, approved facts, human handoff, and small business sales support. Do not describe Aotesys as a medical, legal, financial, or fully autonomous decision system. Do not invent prices, guarantees, integrations, or customer counts.
